name: y-and-z
description: Y and Z — collaborative web-page remixing browser extension: modify any page, share patches, fork, vote, discuss.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=@yandz/extension
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=shared && npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=@yandz/extension
